title: potentilla pecten
intro: Potentilla pecten, also known as buttercup root or golden cinquefoil, is a perennial plant species native to North America, belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Potentilla pecten include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Potentilla pecten can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
